{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1977311?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/junowilderness", "id": 1977311, "login": "junowilderness", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE5NzczMTE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/junowilderness", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary The default `formatGroup` and `formatResult` functions in `devbridge-autocomplete` concatenate values into HTML without escaping, allowing XSS when an attacker controls (or can taint) the suggestion data source. ### Details **1. `formatGroup` — `category` is interpolated raw.** `src/format.ts`: ```ts function formatGroup(suggestion, category) { return '
' + category + '
'; } ``` If `groupBy` is used and the grouping field of any suggestion contains HTML, that HTML is executed. **2. `formatResult` — early-return branch returns `suggestion.value` raw.** `src/format.ts`: ```ts function formatResult(suggestion, currentValue) { if (!currentValue) { return suggestion.value; // un-escaped } /* ... non-empty path escapes correctly ... */ } ``` The early-return branch is reached when `suggest()` renders with an empty `currentValue`, which happens with `minChars: 0` and a server that returns suggestions for an empty query. The returned string is concatenated into the container's `innerHTML`. ### PoC (formatGroup) ```html PoC: formatGroup XSS in jQuery-Autocomplete v2.0.0 ``` Originally identified by an earlier human analysis; the PoC above was produced with the assistance of Claude Opus 4.7. ### Impact XSS in pages that render attacker-controllable suggestion data. The actual impact depends on what the embedding page has access to (cookies, session tokens, DOM), per standard reflected/stored XSS. ### Patch Both formatters now run their interpolated input through the browser's text-node escaping (`createElement` + `textContent`) before producing the HTML string. Fixed in version `2.0.1`.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hvqh-jw65-wcpq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-22T23:00:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hvqh-jw65-wcpq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hvqh-jw65-wcpq"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-22T23:00:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/devbridge/jQuery-Autocomplete/security/advisories/GHSA-hvqh-jw65-wcpq", "https://github.com/devbridge/jQuery-Autocomplete/commit/63ff096ff5b77a90aac7fb5dad7c86e538a59ce0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hvqh-jw65-wcpq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tkirda/jQuery-Autocomplete/security-advisories/GHSA-hvqh-jw65-wcpq", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/devbridge/jQuery-Autocomplete", "summary": "devbridge-autocomplete has XSS in its default formatters: formatGroup and formatResult fail to escape HTML in untrusted inputs", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-22T23:00:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hvqh-jw65-wcpq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "devbridge-autocomplete"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: devbridge-autocomplete has XSS in its default formatters: formatGroup and formatResult fail to escape HTML in untrusted inputs
